description: n8n workflow automation platform - configuration, deployment, and production gotchas (v2.8+)

execution_pruning.note: Successful executions are NOT saved. Only errors remain for debugging.

critical_gotchas_v28.description: CRITICAL: Hard-won lessons from production debugging. Read before working with n8n.

expression_evaluation.problem: {{ $json.xxx }} in HTTP Request node with contentType 'raw' is NOT evaluated in n8n v2.8
expression_evaluation.symptoms: Literal string '{{ $json.content }}' gets written/sent instead of actual data
solutions: BEST: Build complete body in Code node, output as single field, reference with ={{ $json.bodyField }}
expression_evaluation.note: In contentType 'json' (jsonBody field), {{ expressions }} work normally

if_node_operator.problem: IF node v2 operator 'boolean:equal' no longer recognized in v2.8
if_node_operator.note: Loose validation allows string 'true' to match boolean true

json_reference_after_http.problem: $json always refers to IMMEDIATE upstream node output. After HTTP Request, $json is the HTTP response, NOT your data.

code_node_console_log.problem: Code node v2 runs in separate JS Task Runner process. console.log is NOT visible in docker logs.
code_node_console_log.workaround: Query execution_data table in SQLite database to see node outputs

import_creates_duplicates.problem: n8n import:workflow ALWAYS creates a NEW workflow. There is no update-in-place.
import_creates_duplicates.fix: Update existing workflows via SQLite database directly, then restart n8n

execute_cli_port_conflict.problem: n8n execute CLI cannot run while n8n server is running
execute_cli_port_conflict.error_message: Task Broker's port 5679 is already in use
execute_cli_port_conflict.workaround: Use Manual Trigger in n8n UI or add temporary webhook trigger for testing

sqlite_wal_docker_cp.problem: docker cp of SQLite database may miss WAL file, causing database corruption
sqlite_wal_docker_cp.error_message: SQLITE_CORRUPT: database disk image is malformed
sqlite_wal_docker_cp.fix: Use dump/restore: sqlite3 old.db .dump | sqlite3 new.db
sqlite_wal_docker_cp.prevention: Always use docker exec with node scripts to query/update from INSIDE the container

deployment.description: Workflow deployment procedures for n8n instance

update_existing_workflow.description: PREFERRED method for updating workflows already on n8n
steps: 3. Copy into container: sudo docker cp /tmp/workflow.json n8n:/tmp/
4. Write update script (see template), copy in, and run
6. Clean up temp files on host and in container

first_time_import.description: Only for NEW workflows that don't exist yet
first_time_import.command: sudo docker exec n8n n8n import:workflow --input=/tmp/workflow.json
first_time_import.warning: Creates a new workflow each time. NEVER use for updates!

query_workflows.one_liner: sudo docker exec n8n node -e "const s=require('/usr/local/lib/node_modules/n8n/node_modules/.pnpm/sqlite3@5.1.7/node_modules/sqlite3');const d=new s.Database('/home/node/.n8n/database.sqlite');d.all('SELECT id,name,active FROM workflow_entity',(e,r)=>{r.forEach(x=>console.log(JSON.stringify(x)));d.close()});"

teams_integration.description: Sending Adaptive Cards to Microsoft Teams via Power Automate
critical_rules: Power Automate PostCardToConversation expects messageBody = Adaptive Card JSON directly (type: AdaptiveCard at root)
If PA flow stores full body, it must extract card with: @string(first(variables('Body')?['Attachments'])?['content'])
Property names in PA expressions are CASE-SENSITIVE: use 'Attachments' (capital A) in n8n payload
PA HTTP trigger returns 202 even if internal flow actions fail - always check PA flow run history for errors
n8n sends wrapper format: {type: 'message', Attachments: [{contentType: '...', content: {AdaptiveCard}}]}
teams_integration.note: Webhook URL stored in workflow JSON, not here (security)

xml_rpc_integration.description: DokuWiki XML-RPC integration patterns for n8n

common_methods.putPage: wiki.putPage - params: page ID, content, {sum: edit summary}

xml_rpc_integration.response_handling: XML responses stored in $json.data field (auto-detected as text)
xml_rpc_integration.gotcha: Content must be XML-encoded before embedding in XML-RPC body (use encodeXml helper in Code node)

patterns.triggers: Weekly Schedule, Manual Trigger, Webhook Trigger
patterns.http: Get Recent Changes, Save Updated Page
patterns.code: Filter and Categorize Changes, Update Newsticker Content

on_startup.message: n8n context loaded (v2.8 gotchas active). Found {recent_n8n.count} n8n-related memories.
